---
name: New question suggestion
about: Suggest a new interview question (and ideally an answer) to add
title: "[New Question] "
labels: new-question
---

**Category**
Which existing category does this belong in? (e.g., "3. Protocol & Communication Design"). If you think it needs a new category, say so.

**Suggested difficulty**
🟢 Foundational / 🟡 Intermediate / 🔴 Advanced

**Question**
The question text.

**Suggested answer (optional but appreciated)**
Your draft answer, if you have one. Doesn't need to be polished — maintainers/contributors can help refine it.

**Why this question is worth including**
Briefly, why this is a good/representative question for this role (e.g., "this came up in an actual interview I had," "this tests a commonly-misunderstood tradeoff," etc.)
